subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! For some time now, no trace of thy pen hath been observed. Such a drought hath come to pass [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مدتیست که اثر کلک آنجناب ملاحظه نگردید چنان قحط سالی بشد در
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @service to others; to the Cause of God
